esp32_sd_begin.message0: initialize SD card with default pins
esp32_sd_begin.tooltip: Mount the SD filesystem using the board's default SPI pins

esp32_sd_begin_custom.message0: initialize SD card CS:%1 SCK:%2 MISO:%3 MOSI:%4 frequency:%5 MHz
esp32_sd_begin_custom.tooltip: Configure custom SPI pins and mount the SD card

esp32_sd_init.message0: initialize SD card using SPI %1 CS pin %2 frequency %3 MHz
esp32_sd_init.tooltip: Mount the SD card on the selected SPI bus during setup

esp32_sd_begin_advanced.message0: advanced SD init SPI %1 CS:%2 frequency:%3 MHz mount point:%4 max files:%5 format if no filesystem:%6
esp32_sd_begin_advanced.tooltip: Mount with all ESP32 Core 3.x options; formatting may erase a card that has no mountable filesystem

esp32_sd_end.tooltip: Close and unmount the SD filesystem

esp32_sd_card_info.tooltip: Get SD card or filesystem information

esp32_sd_card_type_name.tooltip: Return NONE, MMC, SDSC, SDHC/SDXC, or UNKNOWN

esp32_sd_mountpoint.tooltip: Return the active VFS mount point, or an empty string when unmounted

esp32_sd_file_exists.tooltip: Check whether a file or directory exists

esp32_sd_open_file.tooltip: Legacy value block that opens a file

esp32_sd_open_file_to.tooltip: Open a file into a File variable for stream operations

esp32_sd_file_is_open.tooltip: Check whether the File object is valid

esp32_sd_write_file.tooltip: Write text to an open file

esp32_sd_read_file.tooltip: Read all remaining data as text; use bounded reads for large files

esp32_sd_read_file_bytes.message0: read file %1 up to %2 text bytes
esp32_sd_read_file_bytes.tooltip: Read a bounded text chunk from the current file position

esp32_sd_read_byte.tooltip: Read one byte, returning -1 at end of file or on failure

esp32_sd_peek_byte.tooltip: Return the next byte without advancing, or -1 at end of file

esp32_sd_file_available_bytes.tooltip: Return the byte count from the current position to end of file

esp32_sd_file_size.tooltip: Get the file size in bytes

esp32_sd_seek_file.tooltip: Move the file position and return whether it succeeded

esp32_sd_flush_file.tooltip: Flush written data to the underlying filesystem

esp32_sd_write_file_quick.tooltip: Open, truncate, write, and close a file

esp32_sd_read_file_quick.tooltip: Read a whole small text file and close it automatically

esp32_sd_append_file.tooltip: Append text to the end of a file

esp32_sd_rename_file.message0: rename file old path:%1 new path:%2

esp32_sd_list_dir.tooltip: Print directory entries and sizes to Serial
